lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Who was the king of Israel during Elijah’s time?

answers: He was very evil and worshiped other gods
He was a good and faithful king
He was the greatest king of Israel

questions.text: What message did Elijah give to Ahab?
answers: It would not rain until Elijah said so
The sun would not shine until Elijah said so

questions.text: Why did stopping the rain make Baal look powerless?
answers: Baal was supposed to control the rain

questions.text: How did God take care of Elijah by the brook?
answers: He drank from the brook and ravens brought him food
Ravens brought him glasses of water to drink
God made water pour out from a rock

questions.text: Where did God send Elijah after the brook dried up?
answers: To the top of a mountain

questions.text: What did the widow say when Elijah asked for food?
answers: She only had a little left before she and her son would die
She asked Elijah to pay her a lot of money

questions.text: How did God provide for Elijah, the widow, and her son?
answers: The widow's oil and flour never ran out
Ravens brought them bread and meat to eat

questions.text: What happened to the widow’s son?
What did Elijah do when the boy died?
answers: He prayed and God brought the boy back to life
He asked Baal to heal the boy
